ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Harbor FR #160 real scene evidence and viewer entry facts covering #173/#174/#175/#176.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Harbor repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only CloakBrowser-Manager research/source locators outside Harbor.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-173 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No hosted browser or cloud runtime
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, or full profile storage material
No raw CDP/VNC endpoint, raw DOM, or raw network output
No merge, issue closeout, or current pointer retire
validation_expectation: sensitive material check against smoke output
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #160 #173 #174 #175 #176 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-173 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Lode, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, issue closeout, or current pointer retire actions.
integration_evidence: Page scene facts now include screenshot_ref, page_ref, frame_ref, screenshot evidence refs, and element source evidence refs without raw page material.
Viewer facts now expose Harbor-mediated local viewer entry availability, transport, access mode, input capabilities, and privacy boundary without raw CDP/VNC endpoints.
Runtime facts preserve user, agent, and Core task controller states and update smoke output for viewer entry readback.
Provider scope remains CloakBrowser primary/default and official Chrome restricted fallback; Donut Browser remains mechanism reference only.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: Bounded Runtime API facts/fixture slice with no persistent evidence store, no storage migration, no real account/profile/cookie/token material, no hosted runtime, no cross-repo schema publication, and no external visible site action in default validation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: App/Core/Lode receive public refs, URL/title/summary, capture timestamps, controller facts, viewer entry facts, redaction/retention/access states, and structured unavailable reasons only.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite before adding persistent evidence storage, live account capture, raw artifact export, cross-repo API/schema publication, hosted/cloud runtime, long-lived remote viewer, provider-private endpoint exposure, or external visible site actions.
